statement: Teams with high AI coding adoption merged 98% more PRs but review times increased 91% and PR size increased 154% (DORA 2025). The bottleneck shifts from writing code to reviewing it. Measure success by verified shipped features, not code volume. Automate verification aggressively to prevent the review bottleneck.

evidenceRefs.title: DORA Report 2025 — AI Impact on Software Delivery

publicSummary: AI adoption shifts the bottleneck from writing to reviewing. Automate verification to prevent review debt.
cautionNotes: DORA metrics are aggregate across many teams; individual team results vary.
